---
title: "Caroline Louise Alcock"
---

## Caroline Louise Alcock

**Dates:** (1803/4-1892)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1867)

### Biography

Her address was 39 Green Street Grosvenor Square.  Her paper on \'The Ladies Home\' describes her as its Hon. Secretary.  She is found there living with her younger brother in the 1871 census.

### Letters

- Letter from July 4th [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
